basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B. Tech Degree, M.E./M.Tech Degree
qualification.details: Essential Qualification: First Class B.E. / B. Tech Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical Materials Science and Engineering, or allied Engineering disciplines under Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University / Institution. Desirable Qualification: First Class M.E./M.Tech Degree in Mechanical Engineering / Metallurgical / Material Science and Engineering or its allied specializations from a recognized University / Institution.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
